picks.rationale: NTLA surged +54% YTD and +15% 1M, supported by Phase 3 success for LONVO-Z (analyst sees 37% upside). News sentiment is slightly negative (-0.044) but the clinical catalyst is strong; short interest is 44% but this can fuel a squeeze.

COAG has the highest analyst score (1.0, strong_buy) and tremendous momentum: +41% 1M, +23% 1W. Pipeline details (sutacimig Phase III) are a positive catalyst despite negative news sentiment (-0.137).
ILMN is up +93% over 1Y and +42% YTD, with a 1M gain of +14%. P/E of 34.6 is reasonable for a genomics leader, and news sentiment is positive (0.155).
MRNA has extraordinary YTD gain of +121% and +38% 1M, but analysts rate it a 'hold' (2.96) and news sentiment is negative (-0.183). The recent -11% 1D drop suggests volatility.
NTRA has strong_buy consensus with an analyst score of 1.5, +71% 1Y and +18% YTD. EU Class C status for Signatera is a key strategic catalyst, and news sentiment is neutral (0.06).
EDIT has surged +59% YTD and +34% 1M, despite a -11% 1W pullback. Beta of 2.1 signals high risk, but momentum is strong. Analyst coverage is absent (none), so speculative.
RCUS has strong_buy consensus with an analyst score of 1.46, +200% 1Y and +24% YTD. The BMY partnership for kidney cancer combo trial is a major catalyst.
EXEL has solid fundamentals: P/E 18.7, beta 0.42, +29.65% YTD, and positive news sentiment (0.214). Analyst consensus is buy with score 2.26.
SRPT is down -11% YTD but has rebounded +26% in the last month. P/E 54 is high, short interest is 32.6%, and analyst consensus is hold (2.75). News sentiment is negative (-0.142).
RXRX has a -33% 1Y decline but shows momentum (+13% 1M). Analyst consensus is buy with score 2.43 and news sentiment is positive (0.2). Recursion's AI platform has long-term potential.

previous_picks.rationale: MRNA surged +148% YTD and +66% in the last month, with positive news sentiment of 0.188 and strong pipeline momentum as highlighted by recent coverage of regulatory and pipeline catalysts [tickeron.com](https://tickeron.com/blogs/moderna-mrna-stock-surges-74-9-over-30-days-on-pipeline-and-regulatory-momentum-14451/).

COAG has the strongest analyst consensus (score 1.0, strong_buy) and impressive momentum with +45.6% 1M and +14.5% 1W returns, supported by recent pipeline updates including sutacimig Phase III plans.
SRPT shows strong short-term momentum with +35.8% 1M and +12.8% 1W returns, positive news sentiment of 0.16, and a manageable P/E of 58.63 for a rare-disease biotech with pipeline catalysts.
RCUS has a strong_buy analyst consensus (score 1.46) and impressive +35.4% 1M return, with a recent Bristol-Myers Squibb partnership for a kidney cancer combination trial providing a key catalyst.
EDIT has surged +61% YTD and +33% in the last month, with a low market cap of $0.5B offering high upside potential, though high beta of 2.1 and negative news sentiment (-0.03) add risk.
NTRA has a strong_buy analyst consensus (score 1.5) and strong momentum with +30.2% 1M and +23.2% YTD returns, though negative news sentiment (-0.205) and a delayed SPAC merger are headwinds.

NTLA has surged +67.6% YTD and +26.6% 1M, with positive analyst coverage citing Phase 3 Lonvo Z success and 37% undervaluation, but high short interest (45.4%) and negative 1W momentum (-10.4%) signal caution.

RXRX has positive news sentiment of 0.275 and strong 1M momentum (+23.7%), with a low beta of 0.995 and AI-driven drug discovery platform, though YTD is negative (-10.5%) and short interest is high (36.8%).
BEAM has a strong_buy analyst consensus (score 1.31) and strong momentum with +67% 1Y and +32% YTD returns, though high short interest (42.6%) and beta (2.18) reflect elevated risk.
ILMN has exceptional 1Y return of +94% and YTD of +44.2%, with positive news sentiment of 0.155 and a reasonable P/E of 34.11, though high short interest (9.95%) and beta (1.47) warrant monitoring.
